changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO assessments (id, organization_id, assessment_level_id, assessment_type_id, name, description, created_by_id, updated_by_id) VALUES (101, 105, null, 1, 'ERG Vendor Assessment', 'NIST Cyber Security Framework', 161, 161) , (102, 105, null, 2, 'SAP Assessment', 'NIST Org Assessment', 161, 161) , (103, 105, null, 3, 'SF Assessment', 'ISO', 161, 161) , (104, 105, null, 4, 'Patient Registration Process Assessment', 'Healthcare Insurance Portability Accounting Act', 161, 161) , (105, 105, null, 5, 'Credit Card Processing System Assessment', 'Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard', 161, 161) ;
ALTER SEQUENCE assessments_id_seq RESTART WITH 106;
